message:
test(core): add proptest_recorder_migration.rs — 45 property-based tests

Property-based coverage for the last non-feature-gated module without
proptest: recorder_migration.rs (M0→M5 deterministic migration pipeline).

Covers: MigrationStage FSM invariants (rollback boundaries, completeness),
FNV-1a digest determinism/order-sensitivity/batch-independence, serde
roundtrips for all 5 serializable types, MigrationError Display completeness,
checkpoint ordinal range validation, and manifest field consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
